window_summary: This window tracks the recent chartjs/Chart.js release stream from v3.8.0 through v4.5.1, covering major version 4 migration, ESM support, new features like point label hiding and selfJoin for doughnut charts, and numerous bug fixes and type improvements.

chunks.title: v3.8.0
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: chartjs/Chart.js
Release: v3.8.0
Tag: v3.8.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2022-05-25T14:13:07Z; created_at: 2022-05-25T14:06:57Z
Release notes:
# Essential Links
* [npm](https://www.npmjs.com/package/chart.js)
* [Migration guide](https://www.chartjs.org/docs/latest/getting-started/v3-migration)
* [Docs](https://www.chartjs.org/docs/latest/)
* [API](https://www.chartjs.org/docs/latest/api/)
* [Samples](https://www.chartjs.org/docs/latest/samples/)
- #10341 Correct auto.esm.js import to allow module to work in browser
- #10316 Use abs() when comparing for spanGaps
- #10320 Bump async from 2.6.3 to 2.6.4
- #10290 Bump moment from 2.29.1 to 2.29.2
- #10260 Bump minimist from 1.2.5 to 1.2.6
- #10204 Bump karma from 6.3.14 to 6.3.16
- #10200 Bump url-parse from 1.5.7 to 1.5.10
- #10198 Bump prismjs from 1.25.0 to 1.27.0
- #10181 Bump url-parse from 1.5.3 to 1.5.7
- #10146 Bump karma from 6.3.9 to 6.3.14
- #10150 Bump log4js from 6.3.0 to 6.4.1
- #10152 Bump engine.io from 6.1.0 to 6.1.2
- #10151 Bump node-fetch from 2.6.6 to 2.6.7
- #10149 Bump follow-redirects from 1.14.6 to 1.14.8
## Enhancements
- #10362 Add option to include invisible points
- #10328 Resolve canvasGradient is undefined in node
- #10293 Enable configuration of radial scale point label border radius
- #10278 Allow time scale to offset using skipped ticks
- #10046 Interaction functions
- #10182 Allow individual chart controllers to opt-in to the decimation plugin
- #10088 Make object notation usable for polarArea and radar
- #10106 Add new align 'inner' for X axis
## Bugs Fixed
- #10371 Update to v0.2.1 color dependency to fix bug with invalid colours
- #10340 Update scale polarArea correctly on data hide
- #10289 display tooltips only at points in chart area
- #10328 Resolve canvasGradient is undefined in node
- #10301 Trigger legend onLeave when the mouse leaves the canvas
- #10276 Document tooltip draw hooks and only call hooks when the tooltip draws
- #10157 minimum bar length setting keeps bar base in view
## Types
- #10364 Types: Allow font to be partial scriptable and individually scriptable
- #10283 Types: add 'middle' to borderSkipped
- #10275 Export types for cartesian and radial tick options
- #10269 add startAngle to radial scale options typings
- #10254 Add missing fields to the ScriptableContext type
- #10179 Allow array for line opts in dataset
## Documentation
- #10308 Add links to docs in all the samples
- #10259 Fix a typo in data-structures.md
- #10266 Correct chart initialization flow
- #10250 Update link to filler plugin
- #10184 Fix broken link in Animations docs page.
- #10158 remove hardcoded licenseYear in docs
- #10156 update link to license and bump license year
- #10154 Document scale update plugin hooks
## Development
- #10377 Bump to 3.8.0
- #10247 Resolve circulair import filler plugin
- #10243 Replace deprecated String.prototype.substr()
- #10040 Refactor filler plugin for easier maintenance
Thanks to @CommanderRoot, @LeeLenaleee, @Talla2XLC, @akiraaso, @dependabot, @dependabot[bot], @etimberg, @joshkel, @kurkle, @kylejonesdev, @linkviii, @luke-heberling, @msteiger, @pzelnip, @t-mangoe and @yhvicey
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the chartjs/Chart.js release v3.8.0, the project delivers enhancements such as an option to include invisible points, resolution of canvasGradient undefined in node, configuration of radial scale point label border radius, time scale offset using skipped ticks, interaction functions, individual chart controller opt-in to the decimation plugin, object notation for polarArea and radar, and a new 'inner' align for X axis. Bugs fixed include updating the color dependency to v0.2.1 to fix invalid colours, updating scale polarArea correctly on data hide, displaying tooltips only at points in chart area, triggering legend onLeave when the mouse leaves the canvas, documenting tooltip draw hooks and only calling hooks when the tooltip draws, and ensuring minimum bar length setting keeps bar base in view. Type improvements allow font to be partial scriptable and individually scriptable, add 'middle' to borderSkipped, export types for cartesian and radial tick options, add startAngle to radial scale options typings, add missing fields to ScriptableContext, and allow array for line opts in dataset. Documentation adds links to docs in all samples, fixes a typo in data-structures.md, corrects chart initialization flow, updates link to filler plugin, fixes broken link in Animations docs, removes hardcoded licenseYear, updates link to license and bumps license year, and documents scale update plugin hooks. Development bumps to 3.8.0, resolves circular import filler plugin, replaces deprecated String.prototype.substr(), and refactors filler plugin for easier maintenance.

chunks.title: v3.8.1
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: chartjs/Chart.js
Release: v3.8.1
Tag: v3.8.1; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2022-07-24T15:47:44Z; created_at: 2022-07-24T15:38:49Z
Release notes:
# Essential Links
* [npm](https://www.npmjs.com/package/chart.js)
* [Migration guide](https://www.chartjs.org/docs/latest/getting-started/v3-migration)
* [Docs](https://www.chartjs.org/docs/latest/)
* [API](https://www.chartjs.org/docs/latest/api/)
* [Samples](https://www.chartjs.org/docs/latest/samples/)
## Enhancements
- #10495 Improve error message with id of the canvas
- #10412 Add pointStyleWidth option for legend
## Bugs Fixed
- #10484 Resolve plugin defaults for local plugins
- #10489 draw tooltip with object borderwidth
- #10451 Fix options update when changing to shared opts
- #10454 Fix crash with skipNull and uneven datasets
- #10414 Respect \`fill: false\` with custom draw times
## Types
- #10494 Allow clip to be configurable in options object typescript
- #10436 Add index to legendItem interface
- #10404 Add padding to pointLabels type, add type to scriptable context
- #10387 Allow for each dataset to be individually typed without a main type
## Documentation
- #10490 document defaults for plugins
- #10497 Update link to be able to use within github
- #10446 Add a stale version warning + a link to the latest version of docs
- #10470 Update integration.md
- #10447 Enforce maximum width on chart editor blocks in the docs
- #10456 Update aspectRatio documentation
- #10415 Update responsive.md
- #10434 Clarify helpers need to be imported when using bundlers
- #10410 Fix typo in link to documentation from sample
- #10400 Fix default value of 'includeInvisible' option in the documentation
- #10392 Clarify api docs
## Development
- #10509 Bump to 3.8.1
- #10493 Bump terser from 4.8.0 to 4.8.1
- #10471 Bump moment from 2.29.2 to 2.29.4
- #10431 Bump actions/setup-node from 2 to 3
- #10430 Bump actions/checkout from 2 to 3
- #10393 Bump eventsource from 1.1.0 to 1.1.1
Thanks to @LeeLenaleee, @Pourbahrami, @andrewl64, @dependabot, @dependabot[bot], @etimberg, @ideabrian, @igorlukanin, @kurkle, @naveensrinivasan, @stockiNail and @touletan
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the chartjs/Chart.js release v3.8.1, enhancements include improving the error message with the id of the canvas and adding a pointStyleWidth option for legend. Bugs fixed resolve plugin defaults for local plugins, draw tooltip with object borderwidth, fix options update when changing to shared opts, fix crash with skipNull and uneven datasets, and respect `fill: false` with custom draw times. Type improvements allow clip to be configurable in options object typescript, add index to legendItem interface, add padding to pointLabels type and type to scriptable context, and allow for each dataset to be individually typed without a main type. Documentation documents defaults for plugins, updates a link to be usable within github, adds a stale version warning and a link to the latest version of docs, updates integration.md, enforces maximum width on chart editor blocks in the docs, updates aspectRatio documentation, updates responsive.md, clarifies helpers need to be imported when using bundlers, fixes a typo in link to documentation from sample, fixes default value of 'includeInvisible' option in the documentation, and clarifies api docs. Development bumps to 3.8.1, bumps terser from 4.8.0 to 4.8.1, bumps moment from 2.29.2 to 2.29.4, bumps actions/setup-node from 2 to 3, bumps actions/checkout from 2 to 3, and bumps eventsource from 1.1.0 to 1.1.1.

chunks.title: v3.9.0
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: chartjs/Chart.js
Release: v3.9.0
Tag: v3.9.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2022-08-02T13:03:06Z; created_at: 2022-08-02T12:54:45Z
Release notes:
# Essential Links
* [npm](https://www.npmjs.com/package/chart.js)
* [Migration guide](https://www.chartjs.org/docs/latest/getting-started/v3-migration)
* [Docs](https://www.chartjs.org/docs/latest/)
* [API](https://www.chartjs.org/docs/latest/api/)
* [Samples](https://www.chartjs.org/docs/latest/samples/)
## Enhancements
- #10439 feat: remove line element from scatter controller
- #10528 feat: pass some chart options to DateAdapter
- #10405 Add circular prop to arc element
- #10530 Skip all borders if borderSkipped === true
- #10517 parsing: support dot(s) in object keys
- #10519 Enable borderDash option in the grid as scriptable
## Performance
- #10517 parsing: support dot(s) in object keys
## Bugs Fixed
- #10524 pass boxWidth only if pointStyleWidth presents
- #10523 fix: calc visible points on update #<!---->10467
## Documentation
- #10527 Add docs for changing from time scale to logarithmic/linear scale
- #10518 Improve docs radial linear grid
- #10522 Fix Stack Overflow tag: chart.js
- #10520 Fix Stack Overflow tag: chart.js
- #10515 Fix dead link on reload or open in new tab
- #10516 Clarifying threshold requirement in the docs for decimation
## Development
- #10541 Bump to 3.9.0
Thanks to @LeeLenaleee, @M4sterShake, @benmccann, @dangreen, @kurkle, @peterhauke, @stockiNail, @thabarbados and @touletan
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the chartjs/Chart.js release v3.9.0, enhancements include removing the line element from scatter controller, passing some chart options to DateAdapter, adding a circular prop to arc element, skipping all borders if borderSkipped is true, supporting dot(s) in object keys for parsing, and enabling borderDash option in the grid as scriptable. Performance improvement supports dot(s) in object keys for parsing. Bugs fixed pass boxWidth only if pointStyleWidth presents and fix calculation of visible points on update. Documentation adds docs for changing from time scale to logarithmic/linear scale, improves docs radial linear grid, fixes Stack Overflow tag to chart.js, fixes dead link on reload or open in new tab, and clarifies threshold requirement in the docs for decimation. Development bumps to 3.9.0.

chunks.title: v4.0.0-alpha.1
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: chartjs/Chart.js
Release: v4.0.0-alpha.1
Tag: v4.0.0; draft: False; prerelease: True; published_at: 2022-10-12T12:48:28Z; created_at: 2022-10-12T11:16:03Z
Release notes:
# Essential Links
* [npm](https://www.npmjs.com/package/chart.js)
* [Migration guide](https://www.chartjs.org/docs/latest/getting-started/v3-migration)
* [Docs](https://www.chartjs.org/docs/latest/)
* [API](https://www.chartjs.org/docs/latest/api/)
* [Samples](https://www.chartjs.org/docs/latest/samples/)
- #10759 Fix #<!---->10749 - backdrops with rotated labels
- #10667 fix: calc visible points on update
- #10655 Provide an empty object when the target of the resolver is undefined
- #10661 TypeScript: NodeNext support
- #10639 enable pointStyleWidth for all legend styles
## Breaking Changes
- #10733 Convert the curve helpers to TS
- #10728 Convert helpers.extra to TS
- #10663 Fix autoskip logic
- #10653 Use ticks.steSize instead of time.stepSize on time and timeseries scales
- #10646 fix: respect aspect ratio with container height
- #10643 feat: remove default axis override when custom id is given
- #10612 Remove tooltip constructor fallbacks, \`this.chart\` and \`this.\_chart\`
- #9166 Refine logarithmic scaling / tick generation
- #10571 Put the border opts in own object
- #10548 fix: same-looking tooltips on charts
- #10551 Use borderRadius for legend and remove fallbacks
- #10591 Change way that linear scales calculate min and max
- #10526 feat: sideEffects false
- #10549 Remove destroy hook
- #10540 fix: pass timestamp to ticks callback
- #10525 feat: add ESM support
- #10504 fix: treeshaking
- #10550 Move parameter of TType in ChartMeta to first option
- #10469 Fix offset on doughnut charts
## Enhancements
- #10683 Use guard clause typings
- #10702 Add warning if filler plugin is used but not registered
- #10653 Use ticks.steSize instead of time.stepSize on time and timeseries scales
- #10643 feat: remove default axis override when custom id is given
- #10608 Use the element's window in getComputedStyle
- #10571 Put the border opts in own object
- #10605 Change react integration test to TS
- #10548 fix: same-looking tooltips on charts
- #10551 Use borderRadius for legend and remove fallbacks
- #10567 feat: tooltip callbacks fallback
- #10568 build: emit sourcemaps
- #10526 feat: sideEffects false
- #10525 feat: add ESM support
- #10504 fix: treeshaking
## Bugs Fixed
- #10691 Use the correct area to clip  for dataset drawing when stacked scales are used
- #10693 fix: aspect ratio calc
- #10641 FIX: render multiline legend items without overlapping (#<!---->10532)
- #10663 Fix autoskip logic
- #9166 Refine logarithmic scaling / tick generation
- #10598 fix: allow beforeTooltipDraw to be cancelable
- #10540 fix: pass timestamp to ticks callback
- #10469 Fix offset on doughnut charts
## Types
- #10772 Convert the Arc element to TS
- #10734 refactor: migrate helpers.dom to typescript
- #10733 Convert the curve helpers to TS
- #10730 Convert the PointElement to TS
- #10760 Types: Change grid option of CartesianScaleOptions and RadialLinearScaleOptions to Partial of GridLineOptions
- #10739 Allow to configure X and Y axis ID in TS for bubble charts
- #10728 Convert helpers.extra to TS
- #10729 Export declare const enums
- #10726 Types: Export UpdateModeEnum as const
- #10722 refactor: move batch of helpers to ts
- #10712 Add defaults to plugin interface
- #10683 Use guard clause typings
- #10660 fix: types and tests
- #10652 Update bar data type to comply with floating bar charts data
- #10627 Convert the easing helpers to typescript
- #10582 Allow animations to be set to false for the tooltip typings
- #10590 Add \`grouped\` option to the typings for barchart
- #10585 add correct padding object to type
- #10579 fix: allow nulls in barchart data type
- #10550 Move parameter of TType in ChartMeta to first option
## Documentation
- #10763 docs: fix typos
- #10748 Updated dead sample link
- #10719 Update namespace of logarithmic ticks section
- #1...
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the chartjs/Chart.js release v4.0.0-alpha.1, breaking changes include converting curve helpers and helpers.extra to TypeScript, fixing autoskip logic, using ticks.steSize instead of time.stepSize on time and timeseries scales, respecting aspect ratio with container height, removing default axis override when custom id is given, removing tooltip constructor fallbacks `this.chart` and `this._chart`, refining logarithmic scaling/tick generation, putting border opts in own object, making same-looking tooltips on charts, using borderRadius for legend and removing fallbacks, changing way linear scales calculate min and max, setting sideEffects false, removing destroy hook, passing timestamp to ticks callback, adding ESM support, fixing treeshaking, moving parameter of TType in ChartMeta to first option, and fixing offset on doughnut charts. Enhancements include using guard clause typings, adding warning if filler plugin is used but not registered, using element's window in getComputedStyle, tooltip callbacks fallback, and emitting sourcemaps. Bugs fixed include using correct area to clip for dataset drawing when stacked scales are used, fixing aspect ratio calc, rendering multiline legend items without overlapping, allowing beforeTooltipDraw to be cancelable, and passing timestamp to ticks callback. Types convert Arc element, helpers.dom, curve helpers, PointElement to TypeScript, change grid option of CartesianScaleOptions and RadialLinearScaleOptions to Partial of GridLineOptions, allow configuring X and Y axis ID in TS for bubble charts, export declare const enums, export UpdateModeEnum as const, move batch of helpers to ts, add defaults to plugin interface, fix types and tests, update bar data type to comply with floating bar charts data, convert easing helpers to typescript, allow animations to be set to false for tooltip typings, add `grouped` option to typings for barchart, add correct padding object to type, and allow nulls in barchart data type. Documentation fixes typos, updates dead sample link, and updates namespace of logarithmic ticks section.

chunks.title: v4.0.0
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: chartjs/Chart.js
Release: v4.0.0
Tag: v4.0.0-release; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2022-11-14T22:51:40Z; created_at: 2022-11-13T20:16:32Z
Release notes:
# Essential Links
* [npm](https://www.npmjs.com/package/chart.js)
* [Migration guide](https://www.chartjs.org/docs/latest/migration/v4-migration.html)
* [Docs](https://www.chartjs.org/docs/latest/)
* [API](https://www.chartjs.org/docs/latest/api/)
* [Samples](https://www.chartjs.org/docs/latest/samples/)
## Bugs Fixed
- #10869 Remove type attribute from dataset specific type specification
- #10867 check the data set type in DoughnutController
- #10806 fix: Always draw full arcs and borders for doughnut slices
- #10855 Fix the missing apply for the color on the legend labels
- #10851 Enable colors plugin for pie charts
## Types
- #10869 Remove type attribute from dataset specific type specification
- #10753 refactor: migrate helpers.options to typescript
## Documentation
- #10816 Updated docs (why Chart.js + getting started + step-by-step guide)
- #10857 docs: notes about html legend, tooltip and title
- #10826 Fix month
- #10827 Grammar error fixes
- #10831 Update example chart config type, remove whitespace
## Development
- #10868 v4.0.0 bump
Thanks to @BrilliantDeviation7, @LeeLenaleee, @dangreen, @etimberg, @gibson042, @igorlukanin, @luckened, @puneetkathar1, @stockiNail and @t-mangoe
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the chartjs/Chart.js release v4.0.0, bugs fixed include removing type attribute from dataset specific type specification, checking the data set type in DoughnutController, always drawing full arcs and borders for doughnut slices, fixing the missing apply for the color on the legend labels, and enabling colors plugin for pie charts. Types remove type attribute from dataset specific type specification and migrate helpers.options to typescript. Documentation updates docs (why Chart.js + getting started + step-by-step guide), adds notes about html legend, tooltip and title, fixes month, fixes grammar errors, and updates example chart config type and removes whitespace. Development bumps to v4.0.0.

chunks.title: v4.1.0
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: chartjs/Chart.js
Release: v4.1.0
Tag: v4.1.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2022-12-16T06:50:12Z; created_at: 2022-12-16T06:36:14Z
Release notes:
# Essential Links
* [npm](https://www.npmjs.com/package/chart.js)
* [Migration guide](https://www.chartjs.org/docs/latest/migration/v4-migration.html)
* [Docs](https://www.chartjs.org/docs/latest/)
* [API](https://www.chartjs.org/docs/latest/api/)
* [Samples](https://www.chartjs.org/docs/latest/samples/)
- #10980 chore: Add Product Hunt button (temporarily)
- #10917 fix: move @<!---->kurkle/color to dependencies
## Enhancements
- #10966 add getLabelItems public method
- #10984 feat: restore commonjs bundle
- #10964 Allow dynamic datasets to be colored
- #10904 Allow color plugin to work with custom dataset controllers
- #10870 feat: colors for mixed charts
- #10886 Pointstyle false
## Bugs Fixed
- #10942 Ensure that args are saved inside of the throttled helper
- #10766 fix: stacked bar chart minBarLength causes overlapping
- #10898 Set the transition mode to the context for scriptable options
## Types
- #10963 fix: unbind instance config from chart type
- #10910 Add stepSize option to time scale options types
## Documentation
- #10976 docs: Update Slack link
- #10965 Broken link is fixed.
- #10955 Update auto import in usage docs
- #10903 docs: add info about ESM into migration guide.
- #10885 update migration guide
- #10884 Move border opts to correct location for samples
- #10872 Remove V3 support, update readme
## Development
- #10962 test: turn on types linting
- #10983 bunp version to 4.1.0
- #10974 chore: add lint cache
- #10930 Update react template to V4 vite
- #10919 Use UDM build for reproducible sample
Thanks to @Kit-p, @LeeLenaleee, @Simon-He95, @benmccann, @dangreen, @etimberg, @igorlukanin, @letheri and @stockiNail
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the chartjs/Chart.js release v4.1.0, enhancements include adding a getLabelItems public method, restoring commonjs bundle, allowing dynamic datasets to be colored, allowing color plugin to work with custom dataset controllers, adding colors for mixed charts, and supporting pointstyle false. Bugs fixed ensure that args are saved inside of the throttled helper, fix stacked bar chart minBarLength causing overlapping, and set the transition mode to the context for scriptable options. Types unbind instance config from chart type and add stepSize option to time scale options types. Documentation updates Slack link, fixes a broken link, updates auto import in usage docs, adds info about ESM into migration guide, updates migration guide, moves border opts to correct location for samples, and removes V3 support and updates readme. Development turns on types linting, bumps version to 4.1.0, adds lint cache, updates react template to V4 vite, and uses UDM build for reproducible sample.

chunks.title: v4.1.1
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: chartjs/Chart.js
Release: v4.1.1
Tag: v4.1.1; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2022-12-17T16:13:37Z; created_at: 2022-12-17T16:06:49Z
Release notes:
# Essential Links
* [npm](https://www.npmjs.com/package/chart.js)
* [Migration guide](https://www.chartjs.org/docs/latest/migration/v4-migration.html)
* [Docs](https://www.chartjs.org/docs/latest/)

chunks.title: v4.3.0
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: chartjs/Chart.js
Release: v4.3.0
Tag: v4.3.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2023-04-28T06:20:23Z; created_at: 2023-04-28T05:18:20Z
Release notes:
# Essential Links
* [npm](https://www.npmjs.com/package/chart.js)
* [Migration guide](https://www.chartjs.org/docs/4.3.0/migration/v4-migration.html)
* [Docs](https://www.chartjs.org/docs/4.3.0/)
* [API](https://www.chartjs.org/docs/4.3.0/api/)
* [Samples](https://www.chartjs.org/docs/4.3.0/samples/)
- #11257 Bump to 4.3.0
- #11217 Enable applying of gradients and pattern on line segments
- #11134 Use custom scale defaults and dataset axis ID options to determine the axis
- #11061 fix RTL tooltip colorBox placement
## Enhancements
- #11055 Enable point labels hiding when overlapped
- #11180 Border is counted as part of ArcElement
- #11121 refactor: rewrite config helpers to ts
- #11100 refactor: rewrite canvas helpers to ts
- #11127 Add borderDash options to arc element
## Bugs Fixed
- #11238 Check for isNaN before building number formatter options
- #11116 Fix: don't generate ticks > max if max is specified
## Types
- #11121 refactor: rewrite config helpers to ts
- #11100 refactor: rewrite canvas helpers to ts
- #11143 Docs: fix tooltip model doc.
## Documentation
- #11241 Add redirect for old V3 migration guides in release notes
- #11244 Fix documentation about how to manage own custom plugin for types
- #11220 docs: Fix a few typos
- #11154 Update tooltip.md
## Development
- #11240 Add version specific urls to release template
- #11212 Update size limits
- #11209 chore: change pnpm version in engines field to be able to use 8.x.x
- #11174 Add colors plugin to size limit
- #11165 Disable canvas acceleration in Firefox 110 in test cases
- #11145 Simplify \_arrayUnique
- #11135 Change labelColors to labelColor in tooltip drawColorBox method.
Thanks to @CodingMarco, @Connormiha, @Demir-Utku, @LeeLenaleee, @dangreen, @defunctzombie, @etimberg, @leo2436, @olenderhub, @shahabhm, @stockiNail and @timgates42
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the chartjs/Chart.js release v4.3.0, enhancements enable point labels hiding when overlapped, count border as part of ArcElement, rewrite config helpers and canvas helpers to TypeScript, and add borderDash options to arc element. Bugs fixed check for isNaN before building number formatter options and fix not generating ticks > max if max is specified. Types rewrite config helpers and canvas helpers to TypeScript and fix tooltip model doc. Documentation adds redirect for old V3 migration guides in release notes, fixes documentation about how to manage own custom plugin for types, fixes a few typos, and updates tooltip.md. Development adds version specific urls to release template, updates size limits, changes pnpm version in engines field to be able to use 8.x.x, adds colors plugin to size limit, disables canvas acceleration in Firefox 110 in test cases, simplifies _arrayUnique, and changes labelColors to labelColor in tooltip drawColorBox method.

chunks.title: v4.3.1
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: chartjs/Chart.js
Release: v4.3.1
Tag: v4.3.1; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2023-07-24T19:46:43Z; created_at: 2023-07-24T19:40:34Z
Release notes:
# Essential Links
* [npm](https://www.npmjs.com/package/chart.js)
* [Migration guide](https://www.chartjs.org/docs/4.3.1/migration/v4-migration.html)
* [Docs](https://www.chartjs.org/docs/4.3.1/)
* [API](https://www.chartjs.org/docs/4.3.1/api/)
* [Samples](https://www.chartjs.org/docs/4.3.1/samples/)
- #11417 Bump 4.3.1
- #11330 [docs] HTML Legend sample: add flex-shrink: 0 to color box
## Bugs Fixed
- #11377 Fix curve path if scale limits are set for line chart
- #11388 Fix time series scale to have each data point is spread equidistant
- #11352 Fix mismatch between hit boxes and drawn items in legend plugin
- #11346 Add text stoke radial linear scale
- #11334 Fix toggling showLine option on scatter controller
## Types
- #11403 Add  missing feature for disabling plugins in TyeScript
- #11396 Fix type of tickBorderDash in GridLineOptions
- #11187 Split the TimeScaleOptions type into composable sub types
- #11383 fix: add pointStyleWidth to type definitions
- #11358 Add \`beforeDraw\` to drawtime type
- #11350 Add events property to Plugin defined type
- #11309 Export explicitly the plugin options definition which is augmented by plugins implementation
## Documentation
- #11345 Clarify update docs
- #11324 Refined grammar and updated overall .md documentation files
- #11322 minor correction of documentation for 'Grace'
- #11284 Correct tooltip dates displaying incorrectly reported in #<!---->11229
- #11300 Expend note that chart must be in its own dedicated container
## Development
- #11318 Switch from Slack to Discord
- #11301  Update slack link
- #11302 Update size limits
Thanks to @Frenzie, @LeeLenaleee, @etimberg, @matthewhegarty, @mukham12, @skopz356 and @stockiNail
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the chartjs/Chart.js release v4.3.1, bugs fixed fix curve path if scale limits are set for line chart, fix time series scale to have each data point spread equidistant, fix mismatch between hit boxes and drawn items in legend plugin, add text stroke radial linear scale, and fix toggling showLine option on scatter controller. Types add missing feature for disabling plugins in TypeScript, fix type of tickBorderDash in GridLineOptions, split the TimeScaleOptions type into composable sub types, add pointStyleWidth to type definitions, add `beforeDraw` to drawtime type, add events property to Plugin defined type, and export explicitly the plugin options definition which is augmented by plugins implementation. Documentation clarifies update docs, refines grammar and updates overall .md documentation files, makes minor correction of documentation for 'Grace', corrects tooltip dates displaying incorrectly, and expands note that chart must be in its own dedicated container. Development switches from Slack to Discord, updates slack link, and updates size limits.

## Bugs Fixed

- #11858 Bugfix/issue 11804 tooltip show for all invisible

- #11796 Add fit method to LegendElement interface
- #11780 types: Allow passing undefined for chart options

- #11781 Fix some typos

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the chartjs/Chart.js release v4.4.4, bugs fixed check if range method exists on element before executing it, return false from the average tooltip positioner on no valid data, fix tooltip show for all invisible, unset _resizeBeforeDraw before _resize() call to avoid possible recursion, fix issue #11717, and fix drawing angle lines on reversed radial scale. Types exclude DeepPartial<unknown[]> from ChartOptions interface, add xCenter and yCenter properties to RadialLinearScale interface, remove box padding from legend types, add fit method to LegendElement interface, and allow passing undefined for chart options. Documentation adds radial linear scale to docs section of samples, updates OffscreenCanvas documentation as it is widely available now, and fixes some typos. # Essential Links
* [npm](https://www.npmjs.com/package/chart.js)
* [Migration guide](https://www.chartjs.org/docs/4.4.6/migration/v4-migration.html)
* [Docs](https://www.chartjs.org/docs/4.4.6/)
* [API](https://www.chartjs.org/docs/4.4.6/api/)
* [Samples](https://www.chartjs.org/docs/4.4.6/samples/information.html)
## Bugs Fixed
- #11938 Fix: applyStack() returned the sum of all values for hidden dataset indices, which causes incorrect animations when showing/hiding stacked datasets.
## Development

- #11933 Fix 404 to samples in release drafter
Thanks to @DeyLak, @LeeLenaleee and @etimberg
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the chartjs/Chart.js release v4.4.6, bugs fixed fix applyStack() returning the sum of all values for hidden dataset indices, which causes incorrect animations when showing/hiding stacked datasets. Development bumps version for 4.4.6 release and fixes 404 to samples in release drafter.

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the chartjs/Chart.js release v4.4.8, bugs fixed handle non-primitives in isNumber, export ...ParsedData interfaces, fix helpers `Chart` type, fix TypeError in Interaction due to out-of-bounds index, return nearest non-null point on interaction when spanGaps=true, and span gaps over null values beyond scale limits. chunks.title: v4.5.0
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: chartjs/Chart.js
Release: v4.5.0
Tag: v4.5.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-06-14T20:39:34Z; created_at: 2025-06-14T20:19:17Z
Release notes:
# Essential Links
* [npm](https://www.npmjs.com/package/chart.js)
* [Migration guide](https://www.chartjs.org/docs/4.5.0/migration/v4-migration.html)
* [Docs](https://www.chartjs.org/docs/4.5.0/)
* [API](https://www.chartjs.org/docs/4.5.0/api/)
* [Samples](https://www.chartjs.org/docs/4.5.0/samples/information.html)
## Enhancements
- #11470 Fix min js two renames
- #12054 [fix] #<!---->12048 - Add selfJoin option for doughnut graphs
- #12058 feature: make above/below colors in filler plugin work with pivoted line charts
## Bugs Fixed
- #12070 Fix: display stacked bar with multiple x-Axis
## Types
- #12064 Document requirement of 'this' when calling tick formatters
- #12063 Add type definition for beforeEvent changed
## Documentation
- #12088 Fix grammar typo: 'only draw line' -> 'only draw lines'
- #12087 Fix minified URL for development builds in the docs
- #12084 fix: correct grammar in segment comments (an segment -> a segment)
- #12082 Update docs for Developers API
- #12068 Fix minor typo, missing period
## Development
- #12090 bump version to 4.5.0
- #12025 Bump pnpm/action-setup from 4.0.0 to 4.1.0
Thanks to @FabTechAT, @Jee-on, @LeeLenaleee, @R2Jeu-prive, @dependabot[bot], @ffdm, @fulldecent, @joshkel, @lucasleung8, @nakanoh, @xavierleune and [dependabot[bot]](https://github.com/apps/dependabot)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the chartjs/Chart.js release v4.5.0, enhancements include fixing min js two renames, adding selfJoin option for doughnut graphs, and making above/below colors in filler plugin work with pivoted line charts. Bugs fixed fix display of stacked bar with multiple x-Axis. Types document requirement of 'this' when calling tick formatters and add type definition for beforeEvent changed. Documentation fixes grammar typo 'only draw line' -> 'only draw lines', fixes minified URL for development builds in the docs, corrects grammar in segment comments (an segment -> a segment), updates docs for Developers API, and fixes minor typo missing period. Development bumps version to 4.5.0 and bumps pnpm/action-setup from 4.0.0 to 4.1.0.

Release notes:
# Essential Links
* [npm](https://www.npmjs.com/package/chart.js)
* [Migration guide](https://www.chartjs.org/docs/4.5.1/migration/v4-migration.html)
* [Docs](https://www.chartjs.org/docs/4.5.1/)
* [API](https://www.chartjs.org/docs/4.5.1/api/)
* [Samples](https://www.chartjs.org/docs/4.5.1/samples/information.html)
## Bugs Fixed
- #12098 Do not notify plugins after their uninstall function has been called
- #12096 Sync Doughnut chart legend options to legend plugin
- #12097 Attempt fixing charts shrinking on certain zoom values in Chrome
## Types
- #12122 fix(types): add drawingArea to RadialLinearScale

Thanks to @LeeLenaleee, @anshukushwaha07, @bojidar-bg, @dependabot[bot] and [dependabot[bot]](https://github.com/apps/dependabot)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the chartjs/Chart.js release v4.5.1, bugs fixed do not notify plugins after their uninstall function has been called, sync Doughnut chart legend options to legend plugin, and attempt fixing charts shrinking on certain zoom values in Chrome. Types add drawingArea to RadialLinearScale, allow null for line chart point values, and add data.datasets[].tooltip.callbacks to Typescript types. Development bumps version to 4.5.1 and bumps actions/setup-node from 4 to 5.

questions.query_text: In the chartjs/Chart.js releases, which release adds a selfJoin option for doughnut graphs?

answer_support.answer_text: adding selfJoin option for doughnut graphs

questions.query_text: Across the chartjs/Chart.js releases, how does the change related to tooltips in v4.4.1 differ from the change related to tooltips in v4.4.4?

options.text: v4.4.1 fixes tooltips for null controller and null getParsed, while v4.4.4 fixes tooltip show for all invisible.
v4.4.1 adds tooltip callbacks fallback, while v4.4.4 removes tooltip constructor fallbacks.
Both releases only update tooltip documentation without functional changes.
v4.4.1 changes tooltip mode type, while v4.4.4 adds tooltip positioner for no valid data.

questions.expected_answer: v4.4.1 fixes tooltips for null controller and null getParsed, while v4.4.4 fixes tooltip show for all invisible.

answer_support.answer_text: fix tooltips (getLabelAndValue on null controller, null getParsed)
fix tooltip show for all invisible

questions.query_text: In the chartjs/Chart.js release window, order the following release-content states from earliest to latest: (1) a release that adds a clip option to scale configuration to allow unclipped scales, (2) a release that adds a selfJoin option for doughnut graphs, (3) a release that fixes applyStack() returning the sum of all values for hidden dataset indices, (4) a release that fixes tooltip show for all invisible.

answer_support.answer_text: add clip option to scale configuration to allow unclipped scales
fix tooltip show for all invisible
fix applyStack() returned the sum of all values for hidden dataset indices
adding selfJoin option for doughnut graphs
